node.statement: MISSING — QSVT (Quantum Singular Value Transformation): Not implemented. Needed for: (1) matrix inversion (pseudoinverse) with O(kappa log(1/eps)) queries, (2) matrix square root, (3) general polynomial transformations of singular values. Requires: QSVT phase angle computation (classical preprocessing via optimization or Remez algorithm), and the QSVT circuit construction (alternating signal operator and signal processing operators). This is the SECOND LARGEST GAP. Depends on block encoding framework.
